title: Two dead, one injured in R328 crash
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men have died and one...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men have died and one woman has been seriously injured in a single-vehicle crash on the R328 near Brandwag this afternoon, 24 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men have died and one woman has been seriously injured in a single-vehicle crash on the R328 near Brandwag this afternoon, 24 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies said, according to reports available, Da Gamaskop Police had been conducting patrols in the Ruiterbos area when they were alerted by a member of the public about a car that had left the road at about 13:50."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Upon arrival, police found a Datsun Go which overturned with three occupants,\" said Spies.","html":"\"Upon arrival, police found a Datsun Go which overturned with three occupants,\" said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said two men, aged 36 and 61, sustained multiple injuries and were declared dead at the scene by emergency medical services. He said the other occupant, a woman, was seriously injured and transported to a nearby hospital for treatment.","html":"He said two men, aged 36 and 61, sustained multiple injuries and were declared dead at the scene by emergency medical services. He said the other occupant, a woman, was seriously injured and transported to a nearby hospital for treatment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said the cause of the crash has not yet been established and is part of an ongoing investigation by the Da Gamaskop Police.","html":"Spies said the cause of the crash has not yet been established and is part of an ongoing investigation by the Da Gamaskop Police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The investigating officer, Warrant Officer Arlene Stokes has urged members of the public who have any information on the crash to come forward. Stokes can be contacted on 079 893 9932.","html":"The investigating officer, Warrant Officer Arlene Stokes has urged members of the public who have any information on the crash to come forward. Stokes can be contacted on 079 893 9932."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two dead, one injured in R328 crash
